2606.29984.title: Be Faithful When Response: Returning Fluent and Grounded Answers for Vision-Language Models Reinforcement Learning
2606.29984.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is an important paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, directly applying RL to rollout multimodal reasoning can lead to instability, due to the exploitation of language priors, the neglect of visual evidence, and the generation of reasoning traces that are fluent yet not visually grounded. The question arises: Can initially steer the policy toward visually faithful reasoning regime before applying reinforcement learning? To this end, we propose a Faithful Warm-Start (FWS) strategy that first curates samples with explicit vision-language causal relationships from six general VQA benchmarks to construct the FaithfulQA dataset, where each of the image-question pairs gains a certain degree of visual observations, question requirements, commonsense knowledge, domain knowledge, and the final answer. Subsequently, a VLM-based judge is employed to further purify the dataset, ensuring strong causal consistency and visual faithfulness. This warm-start stage equips the model with the capability to understand causally grounded vision-language patterns before subsequent RL optimization under sparse answer-level rewards. Experimental results show that such faithful supervision improves answer accuracy, stabilizes RL training, and reduces visually unsupported reasoning.
2606.29984.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）是提升視覺-語言模型（VLMs）推理能力的重要範式。<lb/>然而，直接將RL應用於多模態推理的展開可能會導致不穩定，這是因為對語言先驗的利用、對視覺證據的忽視，以及生成流暢但未與視覺相連結的推理痕跡。<lb/>問題隨之而來：在應用強化學習之前，是否可以最初引導政策朝向視覺忠實的推理模式？<lb/>為此，我們提出了一種忠實熱啟動（FWS）策略，首先從六個通用的VQA基準中策劃具有明確視覺-語言因果關係的樣本，以構建FaithfulQA數據集，其中每對圖像-問題都獲得一定程度的視覺觀察、問題要求、常識知識、領域知識和最終答案。<lb/>隨後，使用基於VLM的評判者進一步純化數據集，確保強因果一致性和視覺忠實性。<lb/>這一熱啟動階段使模型具備理解因果基礎的視覺-語言模式的能力，然後在稀疏的答案級獎勵下進行後續的RL優化。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，這種忠實的監督提高了答案準確性，穩定了RL訓練，並減少了視覺不支持的推理。
2606.29984.author: Peng et.al.
2606.29984.authors: Peng,  Lee, Yin Zhang, Yanglin Zhang, Haonan Wu, Zishan Liu, Ruoxi Zang, Xin Zhu, Jiayin Zheng, Jian Yao, Zefeng Ji, Fei Ma
